scenes.title: The Beach
scenes.background_prompt: A sunny beach with golden sand, gentle ocean waves, scattered seashells, a large flat rock near the water, and a red and white striped beach umbrella with a towel beneath it. Blue sky with white clouds. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A sunny beach with golden sand and gentle waves lapping at the shore. A girl in a pink swimsuit with her hair in a ponytail kneels in the center of the beach, carefully building a tall sandcastle with turrets and a small moat using a plastic bucket and shovel. A white seagull with gray-tipped wings stands on a large flat rock near the water's edge to the left, looking out at the sea. To the right, a striped beach umbrella casts shade over a towel laid on the sand, with a second bucket and shovel placed neatly beside it — belonging to someone who has not yet arrived. The sky is a vivid blue with puffy white clouds and a few seashells dot the sand.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place girl in the center of the beach, kneeling and building a sandcastle with a bucket and shovel. Place seagull on the large flat rock near the water (left), standing and looking out to sea. Leave the area under the beach umbrella (right) empty.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom left foreground of this beach scene, a small, ridged, light-purple seashell sits on the tan sand. To its right is a spiral-shaped, light-brown seashell, followed by a small, dark-grey pebble. Further right, near the water's edge, lies a small, ridged, light-pink seashell and another tiny dark-grey pebble. The right foreground shows the edge of the blue ocean with white, wavy lines representing foam. Moving to the middle ground on the far left, there is a small, pink spiral seashell and a dark-grey pebble. To the right of these, a large beach umbrella with alternating red and white panels and a brown pole stands tilted, casting a soft shadow on the sand. Beneath the umbrella lies a blue and yellow striped beach towel. In the center of the scene, a girl with brown hair tied in two braids and wearing a yellow swimsuit with a floral pattern is kneeling on the sand. She faces left, holding a small red shovel in her right hand and a blue bucket in her left hand. Directly in front of her is a sandcastle with four distinct towers. To the right of the girl, a large, flat, grey rock sits at the edge of the water. On top of this rock, a white seagull with grey wings, a yellow beak, and orange legs stands facing left. The background consists of a vast expanse of tan sand that meets a light blue sky filled with large, fluffy white clouds, suggesting a bright, clear day. The ocean water on the right is a deep blue with lighter blue ripples and white lines indicating the shoreline.
